title: adiantum polyphyllum var. rigidum
intro: Adiantum polyphyllum var. rigidum, also known as the rigid maidenhair fern, is a variety of the Adiantum polyphyllum plant species, which belongs to the family Pteridaceae. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in the treatment of various health issues, including fever reduction, pain relief, and anti-inflammatory responses. The health benefits of Adiantum polyphyllum var. rigidum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting immune system health, making it a valuable addition to traditional herbal remedies. It can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal properties, and is often used in combination with other herbs for enhanced therapeutic effects.
